title: Akeno Himejima Skybox
description: A stunning purple-themed custom skybox featuring high-resolution artwork of Akeno Himejima for Minecraft 1.21+.
body:
🌌 Akeno Himejima Custom Skybox [1.21+]

Elevate your Minecraft experience with this high-quality custom skybox featuring the "Priestess of Thunder," Akeno Himejima. This resource pack replaces the default, boring sky with a stunning, purple-themed cosmic nebula and high-resolution artwork of Akeno.

Whether you're building a base or exploring the world, let the aesthetic violet horizons of this skybox transform your game's atmosphere.

✨ Features

Stunning Visuals: High-resolution textures featuring a deep purple galaxy/nebula theme.

Akeno Himejima Artwork: Beautifully integrated character art that blends with the celestial environment.

Seamless Transitions: Designed to look great during both day and night cycles.

Optimized for 1.21+: Fully compatible with the latest versions of Minecraft using OptiFine.

🛠️ Requirements

This pack requires one of the following to function, as Minecraft does not support custom skyboxes natively:

OptiFine (Recommended for the classic experience).

OR Iris Shaders + FabricSkyBoxes (For Fabric users).

🚀 How to Install

Download the resource pack .zip file.

Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder.

Drag and drop the downloaded file into the folder.

Activate the pack in-game.

⚠️ Important Settings

To make sure the sky displays correctly, go to:

Video Settings > Quality > Custom Sky: ON

Video Settings > Details > Sky: OFF

Video Settings > Details > Sun & Moon: OFF (Optional, if you want a clean look).

📜 Credits & Notes

Character: Akeno Himejima (High School DxD).

Theme: Purple Cosmic / Aesthetic.

Compatibility: Works best with shaders that allow custom skyboxes (like Complementary or BSL).

Enjoy the view, and don't forget to leave a comment if you like the pack!
